description: A compact Madrid apartment set up for focused solo work weeks. The living area includes a proper desk setup, strong WiFi, a kitchen for longer stays, and enough quiet separation for video calls. Best for independent workers or pairs who need a central city base without giving up practical work comfort.

images.alt: Bright Limehome-style Madrid studio living space
Kitchenette and dining area for work stays
Desk setup suitable for focused remote work

description: A one-bedroom Madrid apartment suited to solo stays or small-team offsites that need residential comfort. It offers room for two workstations, reliable high-speed internet, a full kitchen, and enough separation between living and sleeping space to support longer collaborative stays.

images.alt: Apartment lounge with table for team planning
Dedicated work area with quiet setup
